title: anthyllis schiwerescii
intro: Anthyllis schiwerescii, also known as kidney vetch, is a flowering plant in the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to alleviate issues such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Anthyllis schiwerescii include reducing inflammation and promoting urination, making it a popular natural remedy for various kidney and urinary problems. Anthyllis schiwerescii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
